permutation.interpretation: p=0.001. Signal Sharpe is distinguishable from random day selection.

bootstrap.interpretation: Sharpe 0.906, 95% CI [-0.015, 1.964]. CI includes zero — Sharpe is not distinguishable from noise.

concentration.interpretation: Top 5 days account for 50.5% of total P&L (752 active days). Highly concentrated — investigate whether top days are data artifacts.
